CM Punk

Details
Pro Wrestlers Database

On this page you find the full wrestling profile of CM Punk, with his Career History, real name, age, height and weight, the Promotions he worked for, all the Face/Heel turns, the Championship Titles he won, his Finishers, Theme Songs, Tag Teams and Stables, his appearance changes through the years, and more.

Phillip Jack Brooks was born in Chicago, Illinois on October 26, 1978, and he is currently 47 years old.

He is currently working for World Wrestling Entertainment on the SmackDown brand under the ring name of CM Punk, and he is the reigning Undisputed WWE Champion, holding the title for 9 days.

CM Punk is a 12-time World Champion, and has won a total of 20 championships in major promotions during his career. He is also a 2-time Money In The Bank winner and WWE Triple Crown Champion.

CM Punk was inducted in the ROH Hall of Fame in 2022.

Profile Info

  • Real NamePhillip Jack Brooks
  • GenderMale
  • Born October 26, 1978 (age 47)
  • NationalityUnited States
  • Birth PlaceChicago, Illinois
  • Billed From
    • Chicago, Illinois
  • Height 6 ft 2 in (188 cm)
  • Weight
    • 218 lbs (99 kg) (August 20, 2021 - Present)
    • 170 lbs (77 kg) (September 11, 2016 - November 7, 2018)
    • 218 lbs (99 kg) (October 6, 2011 - June 13, 2014)
    • 222 lbs (101 kg) (August 1, 2006 - October 5, 2011)
  • NicknamesThe Best In The World; The Voice of the Voiceless; The Straight-Edge Savior/Superstar; The Second City Saint

Career History

  • Ring Names & Gimmicks

    • CM Punk (October 25, 1997 - Present)

  • Roles

    • Wrestler (August 20, 2021 - Present)
    • Analyst (November 12, 2019 - June 30, 2020)
    • Commentator (November 8, 2018 - December 14, 2018)
    • MMA Fighter (December 6, 2014 - November 7, 2018)
    • Wrestler (October 25, 1997 - January 26, 2014)
    • Commentator (November 22, 2010 - December 20, 2010)

  • Promotions History

    Promotionfromto
    PromotionWWEBrand SmackDown July 7, 2026Present
    PromotionWWEBrand Raw December 11, 2023July 6, 2026
    PromotionWWENovember 25, 2023December 10, 2023
    PromotionAEWAugust 20, 2021September 2, 2023
    PromotionUFCDecember 6, 2014November 7, 2018
    PromotionWWEAugust 29, 2011June 13, 2014
    PromotionWWEBrand Raw October 11, 2010August 28, 2011

    PromotionWWEBrand Raw June 23, 2008April 12, 2009
    PromotionWWEBrand ECW July 4, 2006June 22, 2008
    PromotionOVWSeptember 21, 2005July 3, 2006
    PromotionROHNovember 9, 2002August 13, 2005
    PromotionNWA TNASeptember 18, 2002February 25, 2004
    PromotionMLWMay 9, 2003September 19, 2003
    PromotionZERO ONEAugust 1, 2003August 18, 2003

  • Finishers

    • GTS - Go To Sleep - Fireman's Carry into a Knee Lift (August 20, 2021 - Present)
    • GTS - Go To Sleep - Fireman's Carry into a Knee Lift (June 24, 2006 - June 13, 2014)
    • Anaconda Vise - Arm-trap Triangle Choke (September 9, 2005 - June 13, 2014)
    • Pepsi Plunge - Double Underhook Facebuster from the top rope (November 9, 2002 - August 13, 2005)

  • Theme Songs

    • Theme Song"Cult of Personality (remastered 2023)" by Living Colour - Single (November 25, 2023 - Present)
    • Theme Song"Cult of Personality" by Living Colour - Single (August 20, 2021 - November 24, 2023)
    • Theme Song"Cult of Personality" by Living Colour - Single (July 25, 2011 - January 26, 2014)
    • Theme Song"This Fire Burns" by Killswitch Engage - Single (July 4, 2006 - July 17, 2011)
    • Theme Song"Night Train" by The Bouncing Souls - Single (June 19, 2005 - August 13, 2005)
    • Theme Song"Cult of Personality" by Living Colour - Single (February 1, 2005 - June 18, 2005)
    • Theme Song"Miseria Cantare (The Beginning)" by AFI - Single (January 1, 2003 - January 31, 2005)
    • Theme Song“The Gathering 2nd Theme” by Dale Oliver - TNA - Team (November 12, 2003 - February 25, 2004)
    • Theme Song“Pledged” by Dale Oliver - TNA - Single (May 21, 2003 - November 11, 2003)
    • Theme Song"A Call for Blood" by Hatebreed - Single (November 9, 2002 - December 31, 2002)
    • Theme Song"South of Heaven" by Slayer - Single (August 5, 2000 - November 8, 2002)

Titles & Accomplishments

  • Career Awards

    • WWE Triple Crown Champion
    • ROH Hall of Fame - Individual (Year2022)

  • World Wrestling Entertainment

    • x3 /Undisputed WWE Championship
    • x3 World Heavyweight Championship
    • x2 World Heavyweight Championship
    • x1 WWE Intercontinental Championship
    • x1 World Tag Team Championship (with Kofi Kingston)
    • x1 ECW Championship
    • WWE Money in the Bank (2008, 2009)
    • WWE Elimination Chamber (2012)

    All Elite Wrestling

    • x2 AEW World Championship v1
    • x1 Real World Championship

    Ring of Honor

    • x1 ROH World Championship
    • x2 ROH Tag Team Championship (with Colt Cabana)

    Ohio Valley Wrestling

    • x1 OVW Heavyweight Championship
    • x1 OVW Television Championship
    • x1 OVW Southern Tag Team Championship (with Seth Skyfire)

  • Independent Wrestling Association Mid-South

    • 5 IWA Mid-South Heavyweight Championship
    • 2 IWA Mid-South Light Heavyweight Championship

    International Wrestling Cartel

    • 1 IWC Heavyweight Championship

    Mid-American Wrestling

    • 1 MAW Heavyweight Championship

    NWA Cyberspace

    • 1 NWA Cyberspace Tag Team Championship (with Julio Dinero)

    St. Paul Championship Wrestling

    • 2 SPCW Northern States Light Heavyweight/SDW Northern States Television Championship

  • Other Accomplishments

    • WWE Intercontinental Championship #1 Contender's Tournament Winner (2008)
    • WWE Slammy Award - Superstar of the Year (2011)
    • WWE Slammy Award - Rivalry of the Year (2025 - vs. Drew McIntyre)
    • WWE Slammy Award - Return of the Year (2024 - at Survivor Series: WarGames 2023)
    • WWE Slammy Award - "Pipe Bomb" of the Year (2011)
    • WWE Slammy Award - OMG Moment of the Year (2008 - for his MITB cashing-in; 2024 - for returning to WWE at Survivor Series: WarGames 2023)
    • WWE Slammy Award - Shocker of the Year (2009 - for forcing Jeff Hardy out from WWE)
    • WWE Slammy Award - Despicable Me (2010 - for harassing Rey Mysterio and his family)
    • WWE Slammy Award - T-Shirt of the Year (2011 - "Best in the World")
    • WWE Slammy Award - Extreme Moment of the Year (2013 - for his vengeance on Paul Heyman at Hell in at Cell)
    • AEW Dynamite Award - Best Moment on the Mic (2021 - for his return at The First Dance)
    • AEW Dynamite Award - Best Mic Duel (2021 - with MJF on Dynamite Thanksgiving Eve)
    • SPCE Northern States Light Heavyweight Championship Tournament Winner (2000)
    • MAW Heavyweight Championship Tournament Winner (2001)
    • Cauliflower Alley Club's Iron Mike Mazurki Award (2023)
    • PWI Wrestler of the Year (2011, 2012)
    • PWI Most Popular Wrestler of the Year (2011, 2021)
    • PWI Most Hated Wrestler of the Year (2012)
    • PWI Feud of the Year (2011 - vs. John Cena; 2022 - vs. MJF; 2024 - vs. Drew McIntyre)
    • PWI Match of the Year (2011 - vs. John Cena at Money in the Bank)
    • PWI Comeback of the Year (2021)
    • 1° in the PWI 500 (2012)
    • WON Best Box Office Draw (2021)
    • WON Most Charismatic (2021)
    • WON Best Gimmick (2009, 2011)
    • WON Best on Interviews (2011, 2012)
    • WON Feud of the Year (2009 - vs. Jeff Hardy; 2011 - vs. John Cena)
    • WON Pro Wrestling Match of the Year (2011 - vs. John Cena at Money in the Bank)
    • Revolver's Golden Gods Award for Most Metal Athlete (2012)

Teams & Relations

  • Tag Teams & Stables

    • CMFTR - Dash Wilder / Cash Wheeler, Scott Dawson / Dax Harwood (June 1, 2022 - September 2, 2023)
    • The New Nexus - Bray Wyatt, Curtis Axel, David Otunga, Mason Ryan (January 3, 2011 - July 17, 2011)
    • Straight Edge Society - Joey Mercury, Luke / Doc Gallows, Serena Deeb (November 7, 2009 - September 3, 2010)
    • CM Punk & Kofi Kingston - Kofi Kingston (October 20, 2008 - December 16, 2008)
    • The Second City Saints - Ace Steel, Colt Cabana, Daffney, Traci Brooks (March 22, 2003 - June 29, 2006)
    • CM Punk & Colt Cabana - Colt Cabana (April 14, 2000 - June 4, 2005)
    • The New Dawn - Samoa Joe, Azrieal, Don Juan, Joshua Masters (January 8, 2005 - May 28, 2005)
    • The Gathering - Mickie James, Raven, Julio Dinero (September 1, 2003 - December 17, 2003)

  • Managers

    • Paul Heyman (April 4, 2025 - April 19, 2025)
    • Paul Heyman (September 3, 2012 - July 14, 2013)
    • James Mitchell (January 7, 2004 - February 25, 2004)

  • Managed Wrestlers

    • Fred Rosser / Darren Young (February 23, 2010 - May 18, 2010)

  • Family

    • AJ Lee - Wife (June 13, 2014 - Present)

  • Notable Rivals/Feuds

    • Adam Page
    • Alberto Del Rio / Alberto El Patrón
    • Brock Lesnar
    • Bron Breakker
    • Chris Jericho
    • Colt Cabana
    • Daniel Bryan / Bryan Danielson
    • Drew McIntyre
    • Eddie Kingston
    • Jeff Hardy
    • John Cena
    • John Morrison / John Hennigan
    • Jon Moxley / Dean Ambrose
    • Jungle Boy / Jack Perry
    • MJF
    • Raven
    • Rey Mysterio
    • Roman Reigns
    • Samoa Joe
    • Seth Rollins
    • The Undertaker
    • Triple H
    • Wade Barrett

    Madness · 9 months ago
    adding details
    heel 3/15/03 - 1/31/05: joined the gathering
    face 2/1/05 - 6/17/05: the second city saints started feuding with the prophecy
    heel 6/18/05 - 9/20/05: threatened to take the roh world championship to wwe with him
    face 9/21/05 - 6/27/09: debuted in wwe as a face
    heel 6/28/09 - 7/16/11: started a feud with jeff hardy
    face 7/17/11 - 7/22/12: "left" wwe as a face
    heel 7/23/12 - 6/16/13: turned on the rock
    face 6/17/13 - 1/26/14: attacked by brock lesnar
    face 8/20/21 - present: returned to wrestling as a face
